stonetop.summary: A peat-mound spirit of punishment that smothers the condemned.

system.concept: A peat-mound spirit of punishment that smothers the condemned.
system.description: In @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.UstvXnD6EA9IBBO3]{Ferrier's Fen}, not far from @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge}, there lies a peat mound where the town buries criminals alive. Over the years, the place has given birth to a spirit of death and punishment. The spirit is young and eager, and can be set to work upon criminals.
